title: Creating one dynamic item across multiple boards
excerpt:
I have a board (“Board A”) that represents all of the planned/published emails and social media posts for my org. That board has two groups: email and social. 
Each item on the board contains the name of the email/post. …

posts.author: JakeF (Jake)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board (“Board A”) that represents all of the planned/published emails and social media posts for my org. That board has two groups: email and social.

Each item on the board contains the name of the email/post. There are several other fields, in the form of labels, on each item. One of those fields is “sponsor.” Here, a member of my team can select a corresponding sponsor (if one exists) for that specific post.

What I’d like to do is as follows:

  • When an item is created on Board A, I’d like the same item to appear on another board (“Board B”).

  • I would like Board B to be arranged by different groups (Sponsors) instead of email/social. This means that an email from Board A tagged with Sponsor 1 will show up in the Sponsor 1 group on Board B.

  • I would like the items on both boards to be linked/dynamic. For example, if an item is deleted on Board A, I would like for it to be deleted on Board B as well. If any of the fields are changed on Board B, I would like the changes to be represented on the mirrored item on Board A.

Sorry for the complexity. I hope this makes sense. Want to know if this is even possible and if so, what steps I might need to take to make it happen.

posts.author: hbeckett (Haley Beckett)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe Monday is aware of this but has not implemented it yet. See feature request links below that can be voted for (if these are the same idea):

Item lives on multiple boards Feature requests
Hi I’ve always wanted all information to be interconnected: I created a board as a list for upcoming tasks and I have another board as Weekly Team Tasks where the tasks got assigned to people. I linked the two boards from the list one and mirrored the Status column from the Weekly Task one, but the show-up Status column in the list board cannot function as a real Status column. For example, I cannot generate convenient views in the list board because Monday does not recognize the mirrored status…
Same item on multiple boards Feature requests
Need a way for the same item to live on multiple boards, with the changes made in one place (be it notes, status changes, date changes, files uploaded to the info box, etc.) reflecting in the other board. I can’t figure out how to do this.

posts.author: NikolaMastilovic (Nikola Mastilovic (SpicyTab))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jake!

We recently published an app that can do just that - Maybe that will solve the needs you have?

App link: MultiBoard Items - monday.com Marketplace

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Depending on your needs, you maybe able to do this with one Board…

Board A contains the Items, then have different views - one for “planned/published emails” which has a filter to show these and another for “social media”, this with the filter for Social items.
You can have items that are tagged with both and they will appear in both views… no need to “sync” anything.
Each view can have different “Sort” and/or “Group by” options saved to allow you the sponsor view.

The other option is to use an app (or Make.com) … we have some complex boards that we do sync, but is a bit of a pain.
